div.head: Editorial Note
div.p:
On February 29 the Central Intelligence Agency circulated advance copies of Special Estimate 22, “Consequences of Certain Possible US Courses of Action With Respect to Indochina, Burma, or Thailand”, apparently with the intention of insuring distribution before the NSC meeting to be held March 5. The Department of State file copy is marked for the use of the Secretary of State. (Lot
63 D 351, NSC 124 Series) Text of an advance copy of SE-22 is printed in Department of Defense, United States–Vietnam Relations, 1945–1967, Book 8, pages 477–484.
A regular distribution of SE-22, with text unchanged, was made on March 4.
